name: Software Discovery: Security Software Discovery
description: Discovery / TA0007. Enumerate locally-running security software / EDR / antivirus processes. An attacker uses this to identify defensive controls before attempting evasion. Read-only `ps` filtered for known-security-tool process names (auditd, falco, osquery, crowdsec, aide, tripwire, ossec, wazuh, clamav, freshclam). Captures whether any are running without invoking them.
exec: ps -eo comm 2>/dev/null | sort -u | grep -iE 'auditd|falco|osquery|crowdsec|aide|tripwire|ossec|wazuh|clamav|freshclam' | head -10; ps -eo comm 2>/dev/null | sort -u | grep -iE 'auditd|falco|osquery|crowdsec|aide|tripwire|ossec|wazuh|clamav|freshclam' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'security software detected' || echo 'no listed security software detected (does NOT mean none is installed — only that none of the canonical-named processes is running)'
